en.extract:
The Pampas meadowlark (Leistes defilippii) is a species of bird in the family Icteridae. It is scattered across the Pampas Plain.
Its natural habitats are temperate shrubland, pampas grassland, subtropical or tropical dry lowland grassland, and pastureland. It is threatened by habitat loss.

The '''Pampas meadowlark''' ('''''Leistes defilippii''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Icteridae]]. It is scattered across the [[Pampas Plain]].

Its natural [[habitat]]s are temperate [[shrubland]], pampas grassland, subtropical or tropical dry lowland [[grassland]], and pastureland. It is threatened by [[habitat loss]].
